parry.name: Parry
parry.description: Passive. 20% of your Attack is added to Armor while wielding a sword. Does not apply if flanked.

improved_parry.name: Improved Parry
improved_parry.description: Passive. 40% of your Attack is added to Armor. Parry applies against the first melee hit each round even if flanked.

measured_strike.name: Measured Strike
measured_strike.description: Active (3 Stamina). Make an attack with +20% accuracy. On hit, gain +15% Armor for 1 turn.
measured_strike.flavor: The sword teaches restraint before aggression.

lunge.name: Lunge
lunge.description: Active (4 Stamina). Leap up to 2 tiles toward an enemy and make a sword attack with +25% damage.

riposte.name: Riposte
riposte.description: Passive trigger. When you successfully Dodge or Parry a melee attack, your next sword attack costs 2 less Stamina and gains +25% damage.

stand_in_the_gap.name: Stand in the Gap
stand_in_the_gap.description: Active. End your turn. Until your next turn, enemies moving past or attacking allies within 1 tile of you provoke a free sword attack.

counterstrike.name: Counterstrike
counterstrike.description: Active (6 Stamina, 3-turn cooldown). Until your next turn, each melee attack against you triggers a counterattack (once per attacker per round).

final_cut.name: Final Cut
final_cut.description: Active (8 Stamina). A precise strike that ignores 50% of Armor and 50% of Resistances. If it kills the target, refund 4 Stamina.
final_cut.flavor: Conflict ends when the line is drawn cleanly.

centered_stance.name: Centered Stance
centered_stance.description: Passive. +10% Initiative and +15% resistance to mental effects while wielding a sword.

one_line_one_breath.name: One Line, One Breath
one_line_one_breath.description: Passive. The first sword attack each combat has +25% accuracy and cannot critically fail.

flowing_footwork.name: Flowing Footwork
flowing_footwork.description: Passive. +1 Movement and +10% Dodge while unarmored or in light armor.
flowing_footwork.flavor: The fight begins with how you stand.

open_the_gate.name: Open the Gate
open_the_gate.description: Passive. Attacks made after moving at least 1 tile gain +15% crit chance.

borrowed_force.name: Borrowed Force
borrowed_force.description: Passive trigger. When you Dodge a melee attack, your next attack gains +30% damage.

empty_center.name: Empty Center
empty_center.description: Passive. +20% resistance to mental effects. +25% to saving throws against forced movement, stuns, and knockdowns.

cloud_step.name: Cloud Step
cloud_step.description: Active (3 Stamina). Move through enemies and difficult terrain this turn without penalty.

whirling_advance.name: Whirling Advance
whirling_advance.description: Active (4 Stamina). Move up to your full Speed and make a melee attack at any point during the movement.

disrupting_palm.name: Disrupting Palm
disrupting_palm.description: Active (4 Stamina). Make an unarmed or light-weapon attack. On hit, choose one: -15% Armor, -15% Focus, or -3 Initiative for 2 turns.

step_between_moments.name: Step Between Moments
step_between_moments.description: Active (6 Stamina). Teleport up to 3 tiles. Your next attack this round has +20% crit chance and ignores Dodge. After teleporting, gain +15% Dodge until your next turn.

heavenly_counterflow.name: Heavenly Counterflow
heavenly_counterflow.description: Active (8 Stamina, once per combat). Until your next turn, the first melee attack against you is automatically Dodged, and you immediately reposition up to 2 tiles and counterattack with +30% damage.

body_as_conduit.name: Body as Conduit
body_as_conduit.description: Passive. Martial Arts abilities scale with 25% of your Spellpower in addition to normal attributes.

deceptive_reach.name: Deceptive Reach
deceptive_reach.description: Illusion spells that target a single entity gain a 1-tile AoE around the target.

fractured_perception.name: Fractured Perception
fractured_perception.description: Illusion spells that already affect an AoE now affect all enemies in line of sight.

crowded_mind.name: Crowded Mind
crowded_mind.description: Enemies affected by illusion effects suffer -20% resistance to mental status effects for 2 turns.

shared_step.name: Shared Step
shared_step.description: Single-target teleport spells also affect allies within 1 tile of the original target.

forced_translation.name: Forced Translation
forced_translation.description: Teleport spells may now target enemies (Focus save to resist). On success, enemies are displaced to a random adjacent tile rather than freely placed.

everyone_is_somewhere_else_now.name: Everyone Is Somewhere Else Now
everyone_is_somewhere_else_now.description: Active (once per combat). A teleport spell affects all allies _or_ all enemies in line of sight.

extended_binding.name: Extended Binding
extended_binding.description: Single-target binding effects gain a 1-tile AoE.

no_escape.name: No Escape
no_escape.description: Bound enemies suffer -20% to saving throws against magic.

this_place_is_fixed.name: This Place Is Fixed
this_place_is_fixed.description: Area control spells gain +2 turns duration and prevent all teleport-style movement within their area.

mental_aftershock.name: Mental Aftershock
mental_aftershock.description: Enemies hit by Space damage spells suffer -10% Focus and -3 Initiative for 2 turns.

diamond_nail_mantra.name: Diamond Nail Mantra
diamond_nail_mantra.description: Ongoing effect (3-tile radius): Each turn, enemies suffer stacking -1 Movement, -10% teleport success, and -5% Dodge (stacks up to 5 times). Deity Yoga — Pierce the Obstructors: All enemies in a 4-tile radius take major Space damage (50% Spellpower) each turn in addition to the movement penalties.

lady_of_the_turquoise_mirror_mantra.name: Lady of the Turquoise Mirror Mantra
lady_of_the_turquoise_mirror_mantra.description: Ongoing effect: Each turn, the caster gains stacking +5% Dodge and +5% magic resistance (stacks up to 5 times). Deity Yoga — Hall of Reflections: All attacks and single-target spells targeting the caster have a 60% chance of reflecting fully to the attacker. Dodge bonuses are shared with allies within 3 tiles.

widened_grace.name: Widened Grace
widened_grace.description: Single-target healing spells also affect allies within 1 tile of the target at 50% effectiveness.

universal_refuge.name: Universal Refuge
universal_refuge.description: Healing spells that already affect an AoE now affect all allies in line of sight at 75% effectiveness.

lingering_warmth.name: Lingering Warmth
lingering_warmth.description: Healing spells apply a regeneration effect: 15% of the spell's healing over 3 turns.

shared_shelter.name: Shared Shelter
shared_shelter.description: Single-target protection or blessing spells also affect allies within 1 tile of the target at 50% effectiveness.

breath_easy.name: Breath Easy
breath_easy.description: Active (once per combat, 12 Mana). For 1 turn, all allies take 90% reduced damage and are immune to status effects.

gentle_removal.name: Gentle Removal
gentle_removal.description: Cleansing spells also heal the target for 20% of the caster's Spellpower.

burn_away_impurity.name: Burn Away Impurity
burn_away_impurity.description: Cleansing spells also reduce the target's worst karma realm by a small amount (hidden). The impurity of the world is slightly lifted.

measured_radiance.name: Measured Radiance
measured_radiance.description: White damage spells have a 25% chance to blind enemies for 1 turn (Focus save negates).

unavoidable_truth.name: Unavoidable Truth
unavoidable_truth.description: Enemies struck by White magic cannot benefit from invisibility, illusions, or stealth for 3 turns.

lotus_refuge_mantra.name: Lotus Refuge Mantra
lotus_refuge_mantra.description: Ongoing effect (3-tile radius): Each turn, allies gain stacking regeneration (+3% max HP/turn, stacks up to 5 times) and +10% resistance to fear and despair. Deity Yoga — Field of Refuge: - All allies automatically succeed morale and fear saves - 30% of incoming damage to allies is redirected to the caster - All healing effects are maximized (no variance, full value)

golden_wheel_mantra.name: Golden Wheel Mantra
golden_wheel_mantra.description: Ongoing effect (line of sight): Each turn, enemies who attacked last turn suffer stacking -5% Attack and -5% Damage (stacks up to 5 times). Deity Yoga — Turning the Law: - Enemies who attack take 30% of their dealt damage as reflected White damage - Allies gain +20% Attack against enemies affected by the Wheel - Status effects applied by allies cannot be resisted for 1 round

immovable_light_mantra.name: Immovable Light Mantra
immovable_light_mantra.description: Ongoing effect: Each turn, the caster gains stacking +5% Armor, +5% all resistances, and immunity to forced movement (stacks up to 5 times). Deity Yoga — Pillar of the World: - The caster cannot drop below 1 HP - Allies within 3 tiles gain +30% all resistances - Area denial and corruption terrain effects are suppressed within 4 tiles

touch_of_gloom.name: Touch of Gloom
touch_of_gloom.description: Debuff spells also apply -1 Movement and -3 Initiative for 2 turns.

chains_of_suffering.name: Chains of Suffering
chains_of_suffering.description: Enemies currently affected by any debuff take +15% damage from Black spells.

amplified_misfortune.name: Amplified Misfortune
amplified_misfortune.description: Debuff spells gain a 1-tile AoE around the primary target.

dooming_presence.name: Dooming Presence
dooming_presence.description: Debuff spells target all enemies in line of sight.

fear_is_the_mindkiller.name: Fear is the Mindkiller
fear_is_the_mindkiller.description: Enemies affected by 2+ Black debuffs must pass a Focus save or become Feared for 1 turn (once per enemy per combat).

shared_hunger.name: Shared Hunger
shared_hunger.description: Vampiric/lifesteal buffs also affect allies within 2 tiles at 50% effectiveness.

soul_feast.name: Soul Feast
soul_feast.description: Damage from Black spells heals the caster for 15% and allies within 3 tiles for 10% of the damage dealt.

tough_flesh.name: Tough Flesh
tough_flesh.description: Black summons gain +15% HP and +10% damage.

legion_tactics.name: Legion Tactics
legion_tactics.description: Black summons gain +3 Initiative and +10% Attack.

master_of_shadows.name: Master of Shadows
master_of_shadows.description: Black summons gain +20% Attack, +20% Damage, and a status effect on hit: poison (zombies), curse (skeletons), lifesteal (vetalas).

mantra_of_the_great_black_one.name: Mantra of the Great Black One
mantra_of_the_great_black_one.description: Ongoing effect (3-tile radius): Each turn, enemies suffer stacking -5% Armor and -5% resistance, and lose 3% of max Stamina and Mana (stacks up to 5 times). Deity Yoga — Abyssal Gaze: All enemies in line of sight suffer -20% Attack, -20% Armor, -5 Initiative, and lose 8% of max Stamina and Mana each turn.

mantra_of_the_blood_drinkers.name: Mantra of the Blood Drinkers
mantra_of_the_blood_drinkers.description: Ongoing effect (line of sight): Enemies suffer stacking Black damage (5% Spellpower/turn, stacks up to 5 times). Damage dealt is reflected as healing to the caster and allies within 2 tiles. Deity Yoga — Wrathful Dance: - All damage dealt to enemies by any source is reflected as healing to allies in line of sight (50% of damage dealt) - Enemies suffer -20% Armor

mantra_of_the_lord_of_death.name: Mantra of the Lord of Death
mantra_of_the_lord_of_death.description: Ongoing effect (4-tile radius): Each turn, Black summons regain 10% max HP and enemies in the area take stacking Black damage (3% Spellpower/turn, stacks up to 5 times). Deity Yoga — Nowhere to Run: - Summons act immediately at the start of each turn with +30% damage - Any enemy killed in the area has a 40% chance to rise as a temporary Black summon

master_orator.name: Master Orator
master_orator.description: Critical dialogue successes have amplified effects: price reductions are 50% larger, reputation gains are doubled.

web_of_words.name: Web of Words
web_of_words.description: Persuasion checks in dialogue become guaranteed blue options (always succeed).

compelling_proposal.name: Compelling Proposal
compelling_proposal.description: Active. Attempt to control an enemy for 1 turn (Focus save negates). Costs 1 action.

magnetism.name: Magnetism
magnetism.description: Active. Attempt to recruit an enemy. Target makes two Charm saves. Fail both: joins your party. Fail one: becomes Pacified for 3 turns.

intimidating_stance.name: Intimidating Stance
intimidating_stance.description: Active. Stun enemies in a 2-tile radius who fail a Focus save for 1 turn. Also functions as a blue option in intimidation dialogue events.

crowd_influence.name: Crowd Influence
crowd_influence.description: Active (once per combat). All allies gain +3 Initiative and +10% Armor. All enemies in line of sight who fail a Focus save suffer -3 Initiative and -10% Armor for 3 turns.

steadfast_spirit.name: Steadfast Spirit
steadfast_spirit.description: Passing a saving throw against a debuff grants 50% resistance to that damage/effect type for 2 turns.

netineti.name: Neti-neti
netineti.description: Passing a saving throw against a status effect has a 50% chance to reflect it back to the caster.

inner_focus.name: Inner Focus
inner_focus.description: Reduce the duration of all debuffs on you by 1 turn (minimum 1).

soothing_presence.name: Soothing Presence
soothing_presence.description: +10% success chance on rolls for non-violent solutions in dialogue.

voice_of_compassion.name: Voice of Compassion
voice_of_compassion.description: Non-violent dialogue successes also improve karma (small hidden reduction to negative karma) and grant 10% bonus rewards.

pacify_the_confused.name: Pacify the Confused
pacify_the_confused.description: Active. Target enemy makes a Focus save. On failure, stops fighting for 2-4 turns. If combat ends during this time, the enemy does not re-engage. Full XP still granted.

aura_of_peace.name: Aura of Peace
aura_of_peace.description: Passive. Enemies entering a 2-tile radius around the caster, and every 3rd turn thereafter, must pass a Focus save or become Pacified for 2 turns.

mantra_of_the_white_saviouress.name: Mantra of the White Saviouress
mantra_of_the_white_saviouress.description: Ongoing effect (3-tile radius): Each turn, the caster and allies regain 2% max HP, 2% max Mana, and 2% max Stamina (increases by 1% each turn, up to 5%). Deity Yoga — Tranquil Flow: All allies gain immunity to mental effects and 50% chance to resist all debuffs.

mantra_of_the_lotus_pinnacle.name: Mantra of the Lotus Pinnacle
mantra_of_the_lotus_pinnacle.description: Ongoing effect (3-tile radius): Each turn, raise all resistances of allies by +3% (stacks up to +15%). Deity Yoga — Immovable Spirit: Every turn, all enemies in line of sight make a Focus save. On failure: Pacified. On success: -50% Attack and Damage (non-stackable) until next turn.

steady_aim.name: Steady Aim
steady_aim.description: If you did not move this turn, +10% damage on ranged attacks.

measured_distance.name: Measured Distance
measured_distance.description: Ranged attacks suffer 50% reduced penalties from distance and cover.

clean_line.name: Clean Line
clean_line.description: +10% crit chance against enemies not adjacent to any ally.

exposed_target.name: Exposed Target
exposed_target.description: Ranged critical hits apply -15% Dodge for 2 turns.

one_breath_one_arrow.name: One Breath, One Arrow
one_breath_one_arrow.description: First ranged attack each turn gains +15% accuracy. If it crits, ignore all armor for that hit.

aimed_shot.name: Aimed Shot
aimed_shot.description: Active (4 Stamina). Gain +25% accuracy and +20% damage on your next ranged attack this turn.

pinning_shot.name: Pinning Shot
pinning_shot.description: Active (5 Stamina). Make a ranged attack. On hit, target's Movement is reduced to 0 for 1 turn (Constitution save negates the pin, damage still applies).

volley.name: Volley
volley.description: Active (6 Stamina). Attack all enemies in a 2-tile-wide, 3-tile-long cone at 60% damage.

kill_zone.name: Kill Zone
kill_zone.description: Active (7 Stamina). End your turn. Until your next turn, make a free ranged attack against each enemy that moves within your weapon range (max 3 attacks).

no_safe_angle.name: No Safe Angle
no_safe_angle.description: Active (once per combat). Your next ranged attack is a guaranteed critical hit.

soft_step.name: Soft Step
soft_step.description: While stealthed, enemy detection checks only trigger when passing within 1 tile (instead of 2).

backstab.name: Backstab
backstab.description: Attacks from behind gain +20% crit chance and +50% crit damage.

sudden_end.name: Sudden End
sudden_end.description: Your first attack made from stealth deals +100% crit damage and applies a severe bleed (10% max HP/turn for 3 turns).

gone_before_the_body_falls.name: Gone Before the Body Falls
gone_before_the_body_falls.description: Killing an enemy with a dagger attack grants a free action (move or re-enter stealth).

offhand_jab.name: Offhand Jab
offhand_jab.description: Off-hand dagger attacks gain +10% accuracy and +5% crit chance.

knife_storm.name: Knife Storm
knife_storm.description: Each successful dagger hit has a 25% chance to trigger one free extra attack (max 1 extra per turn).

too_fast_to_count.name: Too Fast to Count
too_fast_to_count.description: Once per turn, your first dagger attack is a guaranteed hit.

between_the_ribs.name: Between the Ribs
between_the_ribs.description: Dagger attacks ignore 25% of target's Armor.

blood_in_the_wind.name: Blood in the Wind
blood_in_the_wind.description: +1 Movement and +10% Dodge when any enemy within line of sight is bleeding or poisoned.

opportunist.name: Opportunist
opportunist.description: Enemies that miss you in melee provoke a free dagger counterattack.

where_you_thought_i_was.name: Where You Thought I Was
where_you_thought_i_was.description: When you successfully Dodge, 50% chance to reposition behind the attacker, dealing 50% of one dagger hit as damage on the way.

gust_step.name: Gust Step
gust_step.description: Jump, Levitate, and Fly spells also grant +1 Movement and +2 Initiative for 2 turns.

swift_zephyr.name: Swift Zephyr
swift_zephyr.description: Buffs that increase Movement also grant +10% Dodge for their duration.

avatar_of_the_wind.name: Avatar of the Wind
avatar_of_the_wind.description: All allies gain +1 Movement, +2 Initiative, and +5% Dodge passively while you are in combat.

sharpened_aim.name: Sharpened Aim
sharpened_aim.description: Active (3 Mana). Buff the caster's Attack by +15% and crit chance by +10% for 2 turns.

perfect_volley.name: Perfect Volley
perfect_volley.description: Active (8 Mana). Allies within 2 tiles gain +15% ranged Attack and +10% crit chance for 2 turns.

scattering_gust.name: Scattering Gust
scattering_gust.description: Spells that push enemies also have a 25% chance of knockdown (Constitution save).

cyclone_mastery.name: Cyclone Mastery
cyclone_mastery.description: Push effects are 50% stronger (push 1 extra tile) and knockdown chance increases to 40%.

static_edge.name: Static Edge
static_edge.description: All your attacks deal an additional 10% of weapon damage as Air damage.

chain_spark.name: Chain Spark
chain_spark.description: Lightning spells have a 30% chance to chain to 1 additional target within 2 tiles for 50% damage.

avatar_of_the_storm.name: Avatar of the Storm
avatar_of_the_storm.description: All allies' attacks deal an additional 5% of weapon damage as Air damage and have a 10% chance to stun for 1 turn.

chorus_of_birds.name: Chorus of Birds
chorus_of_birds.description: All Air spells have a 20% chance to summon a Songbird (1 HP, high Dodge, non-attacking). Each turn, a Songbird sings, granting a random buff to one nearby ally: +3 Initiative, +1 Movement, +5% Dodge, or +5% Armor. Lasts 3 turns.

host_of_the_winds.name: Host of the Winds
host_of_the_winds.description: Active Air summons also provide +5% Dodge and +2 Initiative to allies within 2 tiles.

mantra_of_the_green_saviouress.name: Mantra of the Green Saviouress
mantra_of_the_green_saviouress.description: Ongoing effect (3-tile radius): Allies gain a stacking +1 bonus to all d20 rolls (stacks up to +5). Deity Yoga — All-Accomplishing Wisdom: All of the caster's rolls gain +10 and cannot critically fail.

mantra_of_the_roaring_one.name: Mantra of the Roaring One
mantra_of_the_roaring_one.description: Ongoing effect (3-tile radius): Each turn, allies gain stacking +1 Movement and +3% crit chance (stacks up to 5 times). Deity Yoga — Lord of Hosts: Each turn, summon 1-3 Rudras (low HP, high Speed and damage, Air/Sorcery-tagged). They act immediately.

residual_power.name: Residual Power
residual_power.description: After casting a spell, regain 5-10% of the mana spent (random within range).

symbolic_weight.name: Symbolic Weight
symbolic_weight.description: Status effects applied by your spells last 1 additional turn.

continuous_recitation.name: Continuous Recitation
continuous_recitation.description: Casting spells does not interrupt active mantras.

layered_meaning.name: Layered Meaning
layered_meaning.description: Spells that apply a status effect gain a secondary rider (choose one at time of casting): -1 Movement, -10% to one resistance, or -2 Initiative for 2 turns.

dabbler.name: Dabbler
dabbler.description: Unlock all level 1 spells from every school.

attune_charm.name: Attune Charm
attune_charm.description: Active. Consume a charm to empower the next spell from its school: +20% Spellpower, +1 turn duration, or +10% accuracy.

prepared_implements.name: Prepared Implements
prepared_implements.description: You may have 2 charged implements prepared at once (instead of 1).

perfect_correspondence.name: Perfect Correspondence
perfect_correspondence.description: When using a charm aligned with the spell's element: +30% Spellpower and -25% mana cost.

inscribed_circle.name: Inscribed Circle
inscribed_circle.description: Active (1 action). Create a ritual circle on your tile. While standing in it, -25% mana cost on all spells.

focused_diagram.name: Focused Diagram
focused_diagram.description: Casting a spell inside a ritual circle grants +25% Spellpower.

grand_working.name: Grand Working
grand_working.description: Active (must be in a ritual circle, 1 full turn of preparation). The next spell gains +100% Spellpower (additive with other overcast effects).

mantra_of_interdependent_arising.name: Mantra of Interdependent Arising
mantra_of_interdependent_arising.description: Ongoing effect (3-tile radius): Each turn, the caster and allies regain 2% max Mana (increases by 1%/turn, up to 5%). Deity Yoga — The Rainbow Web: All spell costs reduced by 50% and Spellpower increased by 50% for all allies.

mantra_of_multiplying.name: Mantra of Multiplying
mantra_of_multiplying.description: Ongoing effect: Each turn, the caster gains a stacking +5% Spellpower bonus (stacks up to 5 times). Deity Yoga — Bottomless Well: All spells are cast as if the caster has level 5 in the relevant skill. If they already do, +50% Spellpower.

observe_carefully.name: Observe Carefully
observe_carefully.description: Active (free action). Examine an enemy to reveal basic stats (HP, Armor, top 2 resistances) and one weakness.

predictive_model.name: Predictive Model
predictive_model.description: Examination also reveals the enemy's likely next action (attack target, spell, or movement).

know_the_pattern.name: Know the Pattern
know_the_pattern.description: After examining an enemy, all allies gain +10% Attack and +10% to saves against that enemy for the rest of combat.

nothing_surprises_me_twice.name: Nothing Surprises Me Twice
nothing_surprises_me_twice.description: Once an enemy type has been examined, all future encounters with that type start partially revealed (basic stats visible from turn 1).

nihil_novi.name: Nihil Novi
nihil_novi.description: The +10% Attack and +10% save bonuses against examined enemies persist across encounters with the same enemy type.

lessons_learned.name: Lessons Learned
lessons_learned.description: After a difficult encounter, the party gains a temporary buff for the next encounter based on what was fought: +10% damage resistance, +10% accuracy, or +10% to saves (whichever is most relevant).

remember_this.name: Remember This
remember_this.description: When a character fails a specific roll type (attack, save, etc.) in combat, the next roll of that type by any party member gains +25%.

guided_practice.name: Guided Practice
guided_practice.description: Active (out of combat). Teach a known spell to another character who meets the basic school requirements.

crossdisciplinary_insight.name: Cross-Disciplinary Insight
crossdisciplinary_insight.description: Active (6 Mana, 3-turn duration). Grant an ally +2 to one of the caster's trained skills (caster must have at least 3 in that skill).

the_lineage_continues.name: The Lineage Continues
the_lineage_continues.description: Teach a spell to a character who doesn't meet the skill requirements. They can't cast it yet, but it's instantly available once they gain the appropriate skills.

ask_the_right_question.name: Ask the Right Question
ask_the_right_question.description: +10% to social checks in dialogue involving knowledge, lore, or investigation.

blend_in.name: Blend In
blend_in.description: You can enter stealth in combat (costs 1 action) and attempt stealth-based decisions in dialogue.

now_you_see_me.name: Now You See Me
now_you_see_me.description: Entering stealth removes all minor debuffs (1-turn duration) and breaks enemy targeting.

where_i_meant_to_be.name: Where I Meant to Be
where_i_meant_to_be.description: After leaving stealth, gain +15% Attack and +15% Dodge for 1 turn.

shady_dealings.name: Shady Dealings
shady_dealings.description: Only melee attacks break stealth automatically. Ranged attacks, spell casting, and item use trigger an Awareness check (+5 bonus) for enemies within 2 tiles instead of automatically revealing you.

cheap_shot.name: Cheap Shot
cheap_shot.description: Your first attack against each enemy in a combat gains +15% crit chance.

play_dirty.name: Play Dirty
play_dirty.description: Successful hits have a 20% chance to apply a random minor debuff for 1 turn: blind (-25% accuracy), slow (-1 Movement), pin (can't move), or bleed (5% max HP).

every_opening_is_an_invitation.name: Every Opening Is an Invitation
every_opening_is_an_invitation.description: +15% Attack and +10% crit chance against enemies suffering from any status effect.

that_was_supposed_to_miss.name: That Was Supposed to Miss
that_was_supposed_to_miss.description: Active (once per combat). Force an enemy's attack to miss. That enemy loses their remaining action for the turn.

smoke_and_mirrors.name: Smoke and Mirrors
smoke_and_mirrors.description: Active (5 Stamina). Create 1-3 false images around you. Images have 1 HP, high Dodge, and draw enemy attention. They move randomly but do not attack. Last 3 turns.

zazouken.name: Zazouken
zazouken.description: False images now attack adjacent enemies for 30% of your damage. Still 1 HP.

say_it_like_you_mean_it.name: Say It Like You Mean It
say_it_like_you_mean_it.description: +10% to social checks in dialogue involving deception, negotiation, or intimidation.

halftruth.name: Half-Truth
halftruth.description: Failed dialogue checks involving lies or persuasion have 50% reduced negative consequences.

they_think_it_was_their_idea.name: They Think It Was Their Idea
they_think_it_was_their_idea.description: Persuasion checks also benefit from your Guile skill bonus.

hands_already_moving.name: Hands Already Moving
hands_already_moving.description: Using a consumable item is a free action once per turn.

gadgeteer.name: Gadgeteer
gadgeteer.description: Grenades and oils are 50% more effective (damage, duration, and area).

comic_timing.name: Comic Timing
comic_timing.description: 15% chance to distract an enemy attempting a melee attack against you, cancelling the attack. The enemy wastes their action.

say_something_stupid.name: Say Something Stupid
say_something_stupid.description: Comedy dialogue options may allow you to exit a situation without combat, though rewards may be reduced or altered.

disarming_humor.name: Disarming Humor
disarming_humor.description: Before some combat encounters, a Comedy check may cancel the fight entirely (Charm + Comedy vs encounter difficulty).

nobody_wants_to_be_the_straight_man.name: Nobody Wants to Be the Straight Man
nobody_wants_to_be_the_straight_man.description: A cancelled combat opens a trade screen with the option to recruit the earlier enemies at normal prices.

it_was_a_joke.name: It Was a Joke
it_was_a_joke.description: Before engaging in combat, see all enemy stats. You may choose to avoid the fight entirely, keeping partial rewards (scouting info, a small item, XP equal to 25% of the encounter).

taunt.name: Taunt
taunt.description: Active. Force an enemy to focus attacks on you for 2 turns (Focus save negates).

heckle.name: Heckle
heckle.description: Taunted or confused enemies suffer -15% Attack for the duration.

slapstick_interruption.name: Slapstick Interruption
slapstick_interruption.description: When an enemy misses an attack within 2 tiles of you, 25% chance they fall prone (knockdown for 1 turn).

comic_relief.name: Comic Relief
comic_relief.description: 20% chance to convert a critical hit against an ally within 3 tiles into a normal hit.

punchline.name: Punchline
punchline.description: When a random effect benefits you (lucky loot, random buff, etc.), increase its magnitude by 25%.

cosmic_banana_peel.name: Cosmic Banana Peel
cosmic_banana_peel.description: Enemies have a 10% chance each turn to suffer a random mishap: miss next attack, stumble (-1 Movement), or self-debuff (-5% Armor for 1 turn).

against_all_expectations.name: Against All Expectations
against_all_expectations.description: If you roll a natural 1-2 on a d20, 25% chance to convert it into a natural 20.

the_universe_loves_a_good_joke.name: The Universe Loves a Good Joke
the_universe_loves_a_good_joke.description: Once per combat, force a reroll of any single failed roll and take the better result.

play_to_the_crowd.name: Play to the Crowd
play_to_the_crowd.description: Gain +2% Luck for each unit (ally or enemy) within 3 tiles.

laughing_at_the_abyss.name: Laughing at the Abyss
laughing_at_the_abyss.description: Immune to fear, despair, and intimidation effects. Allies within 2 tiles gain +25% resistance to these effects.

heavy_swing.name: Heavy Swing
heavy_swing.description: Successful axe hits reduce the target's Armor by 5% until end of turn (stacks with multiple hits).

momentum.name: Momentum
momentum.description: Each consecutive axe hit increases damage of the next by +10% (resets on miss or turn without attacking). No cap.

commitment.name: Commitment
commitment.description: If you did not move before attacking, gain +20% damage.

wide_arc.name: Wide Arc
wide_arc.description: Axe attacks deal 50% damage to one adjacent enemy.

cleave.name: Cleave
cleave.description: When you kill an enemy with an axe, immediately make a free attack against another adjacent enemy.

red_harvest.name: Red Harvest
red_harvest.description: Active (8 Stamina). Attack all enemies in a 180-degree arc for full damage with +15% crit chance.

sundering_blow.name: Sundering Blow
sundering_blow.description: Active (4 Stamina). Make an attack that reduces target's Armor by 30% for 3 turns.

crack_the_line.name: Crack the Line
crack_the_line.description: Enemies hit by axe critical hits must pass a Focus save or become Feared for 1 turn.

intimidating_force.name: Intimidating Force
intimidating_force.description: Enemies adjacent to you suffer -3 Initiative and -10% Dodge.

overhead_chop.name: Overhead Chop
overhead_chop.description: Active (3 Stamina). A slow attack with +30% damage and +15% armor penetration, but you suffer -15% Dodge until next turn.

all_in.name: All In
all_in.description: When below 50% HP, axe attacks deal +25% damage.

two_hands_no_regret.name: Two Hands, No Regret
two_hands_no_regret.description: Two-handed axes gain +15% damage and cleave effects (Wide Arc, Cleave) deal 75% damage instead of 50%.

hard_knuckles.name: Hard Knuckles
hard_knuckles.description: Unarmed attacks ignore 25% of target's Armor.

close_and_personal.name: Close and Personal
close_and_personal.description: +15% Attack and +15% Damage when adjacent to exactly one enemy.

body_blow.name: Body Blow
body_blow.description: Active (3 Stamina). A heavy strike that knocks an enemy prone for 1 turn (Constitution save negates).

rattle_the_cage.name: Rattle the Cage
rattle_the_cage.description: Critical unarmed hits apply Stun for 1 turn.

see_stars.name: See Stars
see_stars.description: Unarmed hits against enemies already suffering from a status effect have a 25% chance to apply a random additional effect: Stun, Knockdown, or Blind for 1 turn.

keep_hitting.name: Keep Hitting
keep_hitting.description: Each consecutive unarmed hit increases damage by +10% (resets on miss or turn without attacking). No cap.

no_time_to_breathe.name: No Time to Breathe
no_time_to_breathe.description: Enemies hit by unarmed attacks suffer stacking -5% Dodge and -2 Initiative (stacks up to 3 times, lasts 2 turns).

relentless.name: Relentless
relentless.description: Gain a free unarmed attack after scoring a critical hit.

burning_blood.name: Burning Blood
burning_blood.description: Taking damage from a ranged attack grants +50% Movement for 1 turn (non-stackable).

bare_chest.name: Bare Chest
bare_chest.description: +25% resistance to fear and pain effects while unarmored or in light armor.

hands_like_iron.name: Hands Like Iron
hands_like_iron.description: Unarmed attacks count as magical for overcoming damage resistances.

iron_shirt_technique.name: Iron Shirt Technique
iron_shirt_technique.description: 30% of your Unarmed Attack value is added to your Armor while unarmored.

one_inch.name: One Inch
one_inch.description: Active (once per combat, 8 Stamina). Deal triple damage with an unarmed strike that cannot be Dodged or blocked by Armor.

hungry_flames.name: Hungry Flames
hungry_flames.description: Burning enemies have a 25% chance per turn to spread Burning (1 stack) to enemies within 1 tile.

feed_the_fire.name: Feed the Fire
feed_the_fire.description: Enemies suffering from Burning take +20% damage from Fire spells.

nothing_burns_alone.name: Nothing Burns Alone
nothing_burns_alone.description: When a burning enemy dies, all enemies within 1 tile gain Burning (stacks equal to half the dead enemy's stacks, minimum 1).

ashes_remember_heat.name: Ashes Remember Heat
ashes_remember_heat.description: Enemies killed while burning leave behind a burning terrain effect (2 fire damage/turn for 3 turns) on their tile.

shared_heat.name: Shared Heat
shared_heat.description: Fire enchantments (Burning Weapon, Bloodlust, Fan the Flames) gain a 1-tile AoE around the target.

circle_of_embers.name: Circle of Embers
circle_of_embers.description: Fire enchantments affect all allies or all enemies in line of sight (chosen at cast time).

blazing_mind.name: Blazing Mind
blazing_mind.description: Charmed or berserk enemies gain 30% Fire vulnerability.

the_sun_does_not_ask.name: The Sun Does Not Ask
the_sun_does_not_ask.description: Dominate and Charm spells gain +20% success chance.

choking_heat.name: Choking Heat
choking_heat.description: Enemies inside smoke suffer -15% Attack and -10% Dodge.

fire_sees_through_smoke.name: Fire Sees Through Smoke
fire_sees_through_smoke.description: Your Fire spells ignore line-of-sight penalties caused by smoke.

where_there_is_smoke.name: Where There Is Smoke
where_there_is_smoke.description: Smoke areas deal 3 fire damage per turn and have a 20% chance per turn to ignite (become burning terrain).

hot_blooded.name: Hot Blooded
hot_blooded.description: Fire summons gain +15% Attack and +1 Movement.

spreading_flame.name: Spreading Flame
spreading_flame.description: Fire summons gain a burning aura: enemies within 1 tile take 2 fire damage per turn.

mantra_of_the_lotus_blaze.name: Mantra of the Lotus Blaze
mantra_of_the_lotus_blaze.description: Ongoing effect (line of sight): All enemies must pass increasingly difficult Constitution saves (starting DC 10, +2 per turn) or gain 1 stack of Burning. Deity Yoga — Body of the Lotus Sun: At the start of each turn, all burning enemies explode, dealing Fire damage in a 1-tile radius equal to 10% of their max HP per Burning stack.

mantra_of_the_red_lotus_lady.name: Mantra of the Red Lotus Lady
mantra_of_the_red_lotus_lady.description: Ongoing effect (3-tile radius): All enemies must pass increasingly difficult Focus saves (starting DC 10, +2 per turn) or become Charmed for 2 turns. Deity Yoga — The Dance that Magnetizes the World: Enemies who critically fail the Focus save become Dominated instead of Charmed. Any enemy targeting the caster must pass a Focus save or lose their action.

mantra_of_the_horse_lord.name: Mantra of the Horse Lord
mantra_of_the_horse_lord.description: Ongoing effect (3-tile radius): Caster and allies gain stacking +2 Initiative and +1 Movement per turn (stacks up to 5 times). Deity Yoga — The Neigh that Shakes the Steppe: All allies gain the full Initiative/Movement bonus plus +20% Attack and +20% Damage, and all melee attacks apply 1 stack of Burning.

point_of_impact.name: Point of Impact
point_of_impact.description: AoE Sorcery spells gain +1 tile radius but cost 25% more mana.

no_warning.name: No Warning
no_warning.description: Sorcery spells cast on your first turn of combat deal +30% damage.

too_fast_to_react.name: Too Fast to React
too_fast_to_react.description: Active (once per combat). Your next Sorcery spell ignores all resistances.

push_the_words.name: Push the Words
push_the_words.description: Active. The next spell gains +100% Spellpower but costs 50% more mana. (Additive with other overcast effects.)

burn_the_breath.name: Burn the Breath
burn_the_breath.description: Active. The next spell gains +100% Spellpower, but you take damage equal to 25% of the mana cost as HP loss. (Additive with other overcast effects.)

say_it_louder.name: Say It Louder
say_it_louder.description: Overcast Sorcery spells gain a secondary effect (choose one): knockback 2 tiles, Burning 1 stack, Stun 1 turn, or Freeze 1 turn.

one_perfect_sentence.name: One Perfect Sentence
one_perfect_sentence.description: Active (once per combat). The next spell gains +200% Spellpower and costs double mana. (Additive with other overcast effects.)

blink_reflex.name: Blink Reflex
blink_reflex.description: Instant movement spells (blink, short teleport) gain +2 tiles range.

now_im_there.name: Now I'm There
now_im_there.description: After casting an instant movement spell, gain +15% Dodge and +3 Initiative until next turn.

sudden_silence.name: Sudden Silence
sudden_silence.description: Sorcery damage spells reduce the target's Spellpower by 25% for 1 turn.

snap_decision.name: Snap Decision
snap_decision.description: Enemies hit by Sorcery spells suffer -25% Initiative for 1 turn.

short_words_sharp_meaning.name: Short Words, Sharp Meaning
short_words_sharp_meaning.description: Sorcery spells can critically hit (15% chance, +50% damage).

no_followup_needed.name: No Follow-Up Needed
no_followup_needed.description: Killing an enemy with a Sorcery spell refunds 50% of the mana cost.

spell_like_a_knife.name: Spell Like a Knife
spell_like_a_knife.description: If a single-target Sorcery spell kills the target, your next spell gains +50% Spellpower.

mantra_of_the_lionheaded_curse_devourer.name: Mantra of the Lion-Headed Curse Devourer
mantra_of_the_lionheaded_curse_devourer.description: Ongoing effect (3-tile radius): Each turn, allies gain stacking +5% magic damage resistance and +5% chance to negate incoming debuffs (stacks up to 5 times). Deity Yoga — She Would Drink the Blood of the World: Calculate the average percentage of HP lost across all allies. Deal that percentage of max HP as Sorcery damage to all enemies. Transfer all debuffs from allies to enemies, distributed randomly.

put_your_weight_into_it.name: Put Your Weight Into It
put_your_weight_into_it.description: Melee attacks have a 15% chance to knockback 1 tile or stun for 1 turn (Constitution save negates).

grounded.name: Grounded
grounded.description: +15% Armor when you do not move before attacking.

fullbody_strike.name: Full-Body Strike
fullbody_strike.description: Active (5 Stamina). Double the Strength bonus on your next melee attack.

second_wind.name: Second Wind
second_wind.description: Active (3-turn cooldown). Recover 30% of max Stamina and gain +10% damage resistance for 2 turns.

breath_control.name: Breath Control
breath_control.description: Regenerate 5% of max Stamina per turn.

hold_the_line.name: Hold the Line
hold_the_line.description: Enemies have -25% success when attempting to push, knockback, or reposition you.

break_through.name: Break Through
break_through.description: Active (4 Stamina). Move through enemy-occupied tiles this turn, pushing enemies 1 tile to the side.

unmovable_object.name: Unmovable Object
unmovable_object.description: Immune to all forced movement effects.

hit_back_harder.name: Hit Back Harder
hit_back_harder.description: After taking damage, your next melee attack deals +20% damage. Lasts until your next turn.

pain_is_just_information.name: Pain Is Just Information
pain_is_just_information.description: +25% resistance to Stun, Knockdown, and Exhaustion effects.

still_standing.name: Still Standing
still_standing.description: Once per combat, an attack that would reduce you to 0 HP instead leaves you at 1 HP.

carry_the_world.name: Carry the World
carry_the_world.description: +30% weight limit and halve penalties from heavy equipment.

nothing_wasted.name: Nothing Wasted
nothing_wasted.description: When you kill an enemy with overkill damage, 50% of the excess carries over as damage to another adjacent enemy.

formation_discipline.name: Formation Discipline
formation_discipline.description: Adjacent allies gain +5% Armor and +5% resistance. Bonus increases by +2% per additional adjacent ally.

shoulder_to_shoulder.name: Shoulder to Shoulder
shoulder_to_shoulder.description: When an ally takes damage, 15% is redistributed among allies within 2 tiles (each absorbs an equal share).

no_one_left_behind.name: No One Left Behind
no_one_left_behind.description: Allies below 30% HP gain +20% Armor and +20% healing received. Allies who disengage or reposition do not provoke opportunity attacks.

unbroken_circle.name: Unbroken Circle
unbroken_circle.description: As long as 2+ allies are standing, all allies gain +15% resistance to mental status effects. Each additional ally adds +3%.

call_the_shot.name: Call the Shot
call_the_shot.description: Active (free action, once per turn). Mark an enemy. The first ally to attack that enemy gains +15% accuracy and +15% damage.

roles_assigned.name: Roles Assigned
roles_assigned.description: At combat start, designate each ally as **Vanguard** (+10% Armor, +10% HP), **Striker** (+10% Damage, +5% Crit), **Support** (+10% Spellpower, +10% Healing), or **Control** (+10% Status Chance, +10% Duration).

tactical_synergy.name: Tactical Synergy
tactical_synergy.description: When allies of different roles interact, bonus effects trigger: Control debuff then Striker attack gains +15% damage; Support buff then Vanguard gains +10% Armor for 1 turn; etc.

perfect_execution.name: Perfect Execution
perfect_execution.description: Role synergies are guaranteed and enhanced (doubled). Once per combat, all allies act as perfectly coordinated for 1 full round: synergies trigger on every action.

bark_orders.name: Bark Orders
bark_orders.description: Active (1 action). Grant one ally +1 Movement and +10% accuracy until end of their next turn.

chain_of_command.name: Chain of Command
chain_of_command.description: Leadership buffs jump to a second nearby ally at 50% strength.

rally_the_banner.name: Rally the Banner
rally_the_banner.description: Active (1 action, 3-turn cooldown). Remove mental status effects and Stun from allies within 3 tiles. Grant +3 Initiative for 2 turns.

press_the_advantage.name: Press the Advantage
press_the_advantage.description: When an enemy is defeated, allies within 3 tiles gain +3 Initiative and +10% Attack for 2 turns.

battle_doctrine.name: Battle Doctrine
battle_doctrine.description: Before combat, choose a doctrine: - **Aggressive:** +10% Damage, +3 Initiative - **Defensive:** +10% all resistances, +15% healing received - **Adaptive:** +5% to all stats, allies gain +2 Initiative whenever an enemy is defeated

command_presence.name: Command Presence
command_presence.description: All allies in line of sight gain passive bonuses: +5% accuracy, +5% resistance, and +5% morale. Each additional ally in line of sight adds +1% to all bonuses.

this_is_the_moment.name: This Is the Moment
this_is_the_moment.description: Active (once per combat). Up to 4 allies immediately gain an extra action. That action cannot be interrupted, countered, or delayed.

rousing_display.name: Rousing Display
rousing_display.description: When combat starts, allies within 3 tiles gain +5% morale and +2 Initiative for the first round.

find_the_beat.name: Find the Beat
find_the_beat.description: Inspired allies have their critical failure range reduced by 1 (nat 1 only instead of nat 1-2).

lift_the_chorus.name: Lift the Chorus
lift_the_chorus.description: When you apply an inspiration effect to one ally, allies within 2 tiles gain a 50%-strength version.

the_crowd_carries_you.name: The Crowd Carries You
the_crowd_carries_you.description: Each inspired ally increases the strength and duration of your Performance effects by 5% (stacks up to +25% with 5 inspired allies).

cutting_remark.name: Cutting Remark
cutting_remark.description: Active (1 action). Inflict -10% morale and -10% accuracy on a visible enemy for 2 turns.

stage_fright.name: Stage Fright
stage_fright.description: Enemies affected by fear or morale loss suffer -3 Initiative and -10% reaction speed for the duration.

heckle_the_will.name: Heckle the Will
heckle_the_will.description: Demoralized enemies have a 20% chance each turn to waste their action (hesitate, reposition poorly, or fumble).

the_laughter_turns.name: The Laughter Turns
the_laughter_turns.description: Active (once per combat). All demoralized enemies must make a Focus save or become Confused or Panicked for 2 turns.

look_at_me.name: Look at Me
look_at_me.description: Active (1 action). For 2 turns, enemies within 3 tiles have +25% chance to target you.

misdirection.name: Misdirection
misdirection.description: While drawing enemy attention (Look at Me active), gain +15% Dodge and +15% resistance to ranged attacks.

split_attention.name: Split Attention
split_attention.description: Distracted enemies suffer -10% accuracy against all targets, not just the performer.

now_you_see_it.name: Now You See It
now_you_see_it.description: Distracted enemies cannot benefit from flanking bonuses or coordinated attacks.

good_with_a_crowd.name: Good with a Crowd
good_with_a_crowd.description: +10% to social rolls when 2+ NPCs are present.

read_the_room.name: Read the Room
read_the_room.description: Failed social checks reveal partial information about what would have succeeded. Retries suffer only half the normal penalty.

steal_the_scene.name: Steal the Scene
steal_the_scene.description: Once per dialogue, convert a failed social roll into a partial success.

command_the_narrative.name: Command the Narrative
command_the_narrative.description: Once per major dialogue, automatically succeed on a Performance-gated blue check.

improvised_masterpiece.name: Improvised Masterpiece
improvised_masterpiece.description: Active (1 action). Choose one: Inspire (allies gain +10% all stats), Demoralize (enemies suffer -10% all stats), or Distract (enemies suffer -15% accuracy). Affects all valid targets within 3 tiles for 2 turns.

sustained_performance.name: Sustained Performance
sustained_performance.description: Performance effects intensify by +5% for each consecutive turn the performer is uninterrupted (no damage taken). Stacks up to 3 times.

all_the_world_a_stage.name: All the World a Stage
all_the_world_a_stage.description: As long as at least one enemy or neutral observer is present: - Allies gain 3% morale regeneration per turn - Enemies suffer 3% morale decay per turn - Social and mental effects by the performer cannot critically fail

first_to_strike.name: First to Strike
first_to_strike.description: When an enemy enters your reach (2 tiles), make a free reaction attack (once per enemy per round).

long_memory.name: Long Memory
long_memory.description: Reaction attacks (from First to Strike, Set for Charge, etc.) gain +15% damage.

set_for_charge.name: Set for Charge
set_for_charge.description: Active. End your turn. If an enemy moves into your reach before your next turn, your reaction attack deals double damage.

none_shall_pass.name: None Shall Pass
none_shall_pass.description: Active. End your turn. Until your next turn, enemies cannot move through your threatened area (2-tile reach) without taking a free attack and suffering -2 Movement for 1 turn.

wall_of_points.name: Wall of Points
wall_of_points.description: Enemies within your reach suffer -10% accuracy on their attacks.

point_control.name: Point Control
point_control.description: Enemies within your reach also suffer -1 Movement and -10% Dodge.

pinning_thrust.name: Pinning Thrust
pinning_thrust.description: Active (5 Stamina). Make a spear attack. On hit, target's Movement is reduced to 0 for 2 turns (Constitution save negates the pin, damage still applies).

disciplined_formation.name: Disciplined Formation
disciplined_formation.description: While adjacent to an ally, gain +10% Attack and +10% Armor.

tidal_patience.name: Tidal Patience
tidal_patience.description: Each consecutive turn you don't move, gain stacking +5% Damage and +5% Armor (stacks up to 3 times). Moving resets all stacks.

sweeping_strike.name: Sweeping Strike
sweeping_strike.description: Active (4 Stamina). Attack all enemies within reach in a 180-degree arc at 75% damage.

impaling_strike.name: Impaling Strike
impaling_strike.description: Active (6 Stamina). Attack in a line, hitting up to 2 enemies. Full damage to the first, 60% to the second.

water_finds_the_gap.name: Water Finds the Gap
water_finds_the_gap.description: Spear attacks against enemies who moved this turn gain +15% accuracy and ignore 15% Armor.

flowing_tide.name: Flowing Tide
flowing_tide.description: After killing an enemy, gain +2 Movement and may immediately reposition up to 2 tiles (free action).

creeping_cold.name: Creeping Cold
creeping_cold.description: Ice spells that deal damage also apply -1 Movement for 2 turns.

deep_freeze.name: Deep Freeze
deep_freeze.description: Enemies whose Movement is reduced to 0 by ice effects become Frozen (incapacitated) for 1 turn (no save).

permafrost.name: Permafrost
permafrost.description: Frozen enemies take +30% damage from all sources. Shattering a Frozen enemy (killing them while Frozen) deals 25% of the kill damage to all enemies within 1 tile.

purifying_stream.name: Purifying Stream
purifying_stream.description: Water healing spells that restore HP also remove 1 negative status effect.

spring_of_life.name: Spring of Life
spring_of_life.description: Once per combat, when an ally would begin bleeding out, automatically cast a free heal on them (30% of your Spellpower as HP).

fog_of_war.name: Fog of War
fog_of_war.description: Active (5 Mana). Create a fog bank in a 2-tile radius. Enemies inside suffer -20% accuracy. Ranged attacks and targeted spells cannot pass through fog. Lasts 3 turns.

black_ice.name: Black Ice
black_ice.description: Active (6 Mana). Create ice terrain in a 2-tile radius for 3 turns. Enemies moving through it must pass a Finesse save or fall prone. Allies are unaffected.

waters_memory.name: Water's Memory
waters_memory.description: Water spells that create terrain effects persist 1 additional turn.

riptide.name: Riptide
riptide.description: Spells that push or pull enemies gain +1 tile of displacement. Displaced enemies must pass a Constitution save or be knocked prone.

crushing_depths.name: Crushing Depths
crushing_depths.description: Enemies standing on water or ice terrain, or affected by 2+ Water debuffs, suffer -15% to all saves.

tidal_surge.name: Tidal Surge
tidal_surge.description: After casting a Water spell, gain +1 Movement for 1 turn.

drowning_pressure.name: Drowning Pressure
drowning_pressure.description: Active (once per combat, 15 Mana). All enemies in a 3-tile radius take Water damage (75% Spellpower) and are Silenced for 2 turns (Focus save negates silence, damage still applies).

mantra_of_the_medicine_buddha.name: Mantra of the Medicine Buddha
mantra_of_the_medicine_buddha.description: Ongoing effect (3-tile radius): Each turn, the ally with the lowest HP% in radius regains increasing HP (5% Spellpower per stack, stacks up to 5). All allies gain +5% resistance to poison and disease per stack. Deity Yoga — The Healing That Asks Nothing: All allies are healed for 50% of max HP and cleansed of all negative status effects. For 2 turns, all healing effects on allies are tripled.

mantra_of_the_unshakeable_one.name: Mantra of the Unshakeable One
mantra_of_the_unshakeable_one.description: Ongoing effect (3-tile radius): Each turn, enemies suffer stacking cold damage (3% Spellpower, stacks up to 5) and -1 Movement per stack. Allies gain +3% resistance to all damage per stack. Deity Yoga — Mirror of Still Water: All incoming damage to the caster and allies within 3 tiles is reflected back at 50%. All enemies in line of sight are Frozen for 1 turn (no save).

lingering_touch.name: Lingering Touch
lingering_touch.description: Buffs you cast last 1 additional turn.

deep_roots.name: Deep Roots
deep_roots.description: Buffs you cast are 25% harder to dispel or overwrite.

dual_aspect.name: Dual Aspect
dual_aspect.description: Buffs that affect a single stat also grant a +5% bonus to a related stat (Armor buff also grants Dodge; Attack buff also grants Initiative; etc.).

generous_spirit.name: Generous Spirit
generous_spirit.description: Single-target buffs can be split between 2 targets at 75% effectiveness each.

spreading_warmth.name: Spreading Warmth
spreading_warmth.description: Buffs you cast affect all allies within 2 tiles at 60% effectiveness.

absolute_presence.name: Absolute Presence
absolute_presence.description: Active (once per combat). All your currently active buffs are applied to all allies at full strength for 2 turns.

weakening_gaze.name: Weakening Gaze
weakening_gaze.description: Debuffs you cast are 10% more effective (higher penalties).

sapping_touch.name: Sapping Touch
sapping_touch.description: Debuff spells also drain 5% of the target's max Mana or Stamina (whichever is lower).

unraveling.name: Unraveling
unraveling.description: Active (4 Mana). Dispel one buff from an enemy. If successful, the buff's inverse is applied as a debuff for 2 turns.

layered_enchantments.name: Layered Enchantments
layered_enchantments.description: You can maintain 1 additional concentration buff simultaneously.

masterwork.name: Masterwork
masterwork.description: Active (8 Mana, once per combat). Double the effectiveness of all active buffs on one ally for 3 turns.

reactive_shielding.name: Reactive Shielding
reactive_shielding.description: When a buffed ally takes damage, 15% chance that the buff absorbs 25% of the damage instead.

sympathetic_bond.name: Sympathetic Bond
sympathetic_bond.description: When you cast a buff on an ally, you gain a 30%-strength version of that buff on yourself.

mantra_of_the_wishfulfilling_jewel.name: Mantra of the Wish-Fulfilling Jewel
mantra_of_the_wishfulfilling_jewel.description: Ongoing effect (3-tile radius): Each turn, allies gain a random minor buff (+5% to one of: Attack, Armor, Dodge, Spellpower, Initiative). Buffs are stacking and persist until the mantra ends. Deity Yoga — The Gem That Grants All Prayers: All allies gain +25% to all stats. Buffs on allies cannot be dispelled or overwritten for the duration.

mantra_of_the_binding_word.name: Mantra of the Binding Word
mantra_of_the_binding_word.description: Ongoing effect (line of sight): Each turn, enemies suffer a random minor debuff (-5% to a random stat). Debuffs are stacking and persist until the mantra ends. Deity Yoga — Nothing Escapes the Word: All enemies suffer -25% to all stats. Debuffs on enemies cannot be cleansed. All enemy buffs are suppressed for the duration.

tumble.name: Tumble
tumble.description: Active (2 Stamina). Move through enemy-occupied tiles without provoking reaction attacks this turn.

flowing_evasion.name: Flowing Evasion
flowing_evasion.description: After successfully dodging an attack, gain +10% Dodge until end of turn (stacks up to 3 times).

spring_step.name: Spring Step
spring_step.description: Active (3 Stamina). After taking an action, immediately move up to 2 tiles (free action, does not provoke).

water_over_stone.name: Water Over Stone
water_over_stone.description: For each enemy adjacent to you beyond the first, gain +5% Dodge (up to +20% with 5 adjacent enemies).

momentum_shift.name: Momentum Shift
momentum_shift.description: When you dodge a melee attack, you may immediately reposition 1 tile in any direction (free action).

perfect_balance.name: Perfect Balance
perfect_balance.description: Cannot be knocked prone, tripped, or knocked down. Immune to ice and slippery terrain effects.

dance_of_the_river.name: Dance of the River
dance_of_the_river.description: Active (once per combat, 6 Stamina). For 1 turn, all attacks against you suffer -30% accuracy and you may move freely between your actions (total movement equal to 2x your Movement).

cats_landing.name: Cat's Landing
cats_landing.description: Fall damage reduced by 50%. When jumping down from height, gain +10% accuracy and +10% damage on your next attack.

terrain_mastery.name: Terrain Mastery
terrain_mastery.description: +1 Movement when starting your turn on elevated terrain.

read_the_flow.name: Read the Flow
read_the_flow.description: +15% to saves against AoE effects (dodging out of the blast).

slippery.name: Slippery
slippery.description: +15% chance to escape grapples, bindings, and movement-restricting effects at the start of your turn.

field_medic.name: Field Medic
field_medic.description: Active (1 action). Heal an adjacent ally for 25% of your Awareness as HP.

triage.name: Triage
triage.description: Field Medic heals for 40% of Awareness and also removes 1 negative status effect.

combat_surgeon.name: Combat Surgeon
combat_surgeon.description: Field Medic becomes a free action once per turn (additional uses still cost an action).

diagnosis.name: Diagnosis
diagnosis.description: Active (free action). Examine an ally to reveal all active status effects and their remaining durations. Examining an enemy reveals their HP and any vulnerabilities.

know_the_symptoms.name: Know the Symptoms
know_the_symptoms.description: After diagnosing an ally, gain +20% effectiveness when healing or curing that ally's conditions for the rest of combat.

preventive_care.name: Preventive Care
preventive_care.description: At the start of combat, all allies gain a damage shield equal to 10% of their max HP.

booster_shot.name: Booster Shot
booster_shot.description: Active (4 Stamina). Grant an ally +25% resistance to the next status effect applied to them (lasts until triggered or 3 turns).

immune_system.name: Immune System
immune_system.description: Allies within 2 tiles have a 15% passive chance each turn to shrug off poison, bleed, or disease effects.

anatomy_knowledge.name: Anatomy Knowledge
anatomy_knowledge.description: +10% damage against biological enemies (does not apply to constructs, elementals, or undead).

pressure_points.name: Pressure Points
pressure_points.description: Melee attacks against biological enemies have a 15% chance to apply a random debuff: -10% Attack, -10% Dodge, or -1 Movement for 2 turns.

steady_hands.name: Steady Hands
steady_hands.description: +20% success when stabilizing bleeding-out allies. Stabilized allies regain 5% of max HP.

natural_remedies.name: Natural Remedies
natural_remedies.description: Healing potions used by party members are 25% more effective.

miraculous_recovery.name: Miraculous Recovery
miraculous_recovery.description: Active (once per combat). Revive a bleeding-out ally to 30% HP and cleanse all negative status effects.

quick_brew.name: Quick Brew
quick_brew.description: Craft potions in half the normal time between encounters.

potent_mixture.name: Potent Mixture
potent_mixture.description: Potions you craft have +1 turn duration and +15% effectiveness beyond the base Consumable Power bonus.

experimental_batch.name: Experimental Batch
experimental_batch.description: When crafting, 20% chance to create an enhanced version with a random bonus effect (extra healing, longer duration, splash radius, etc.).

master_brewer.name: Master Brewer
master_brewer.description: Crafted potions have double duration and +25% effectiveness. Potions you craft never fail.

bomb_maker.name: Bomb Maker
bomb_maker.description: Can craft basic grenades (fire, acid, smoke) from common materials.

volatile_compounds.name: Volatile Compounds
volatile_compounds.description: Grenades gain +1 tile radius and +25% damage.

chain_reaction.name: Chain Reaction
chain_reaction.description: When a grenade kills an enemy, 30% chance to trigger a secondary explosion at the same location for 50% damage.

applied_toxicology.name: Applied Toxicology
applied_toxicology.description: Can craft weapon coatings: poison (DoT), paralysis (chance to stun), weakening (-10% Attack). Coatings last for 3 hits.

persistent_coating.name: Persistent Coating
persistent_coating.description: Weapon coatings last for 5 hits and their effects are 25% stronger.

transmuters_eye.name: Transmuter's Eye
transmuters_eye.description: Identify unknown potions and substances without risk. Salvage 50% more materials when breaking down items.

philosophers_approach.name: Philosopher's Approach
philosophers_approach.description: Can break down magical items into crafting components (reagents, essences, elemental residue).

universal_solvent.name: Universal Solvent
universal_solvent.description: Active (once per encounter). Destroy one magical barrier, lock, or environmental hazard using alchemical means.

emergency_flask.name: Emergency Flask
emergency_flask.description: Once per combat, use a potion as a free action (instead of costing an action).

splash_zone.name: Splash Zone
splash_zone.description: Thrown potions (healing, buff) also affect allies within 1 tile of the target at 50% effectiveness.

nimble_fingers.name: Nimble Fingers
nimble_fingers.description: Can attempt to pick locks. Success based on Finesse + Thievery vs lock difficulty.

master_locksmith.name: Master Locksmith
master_locksmith.description: +25% lockpicking success. Can attempt locks one tier above your normal skill level.

nothing_is_locked.name: Nothing Is Locked
nothing_is_locked.description: All locks below maximum difficulty are automatically opened. Maximum-difficulty locks gain +30% success.

light_touch.name: Light Touch
light_touch.description: Can attempt to pickpocket NPCs in dialogue. Success based on Finesse + Thievery vs target's Awareness.

sticky_fingers.name: Sticky Fingers
sticky_fingers.description: +20% pickpocketing success. Can steal equipped items (not just carried inventory) with a harder check.

the_invisible_hand.name: The Invisible Hand
the_invisible_hand.description: Active (once per combat). Steal one consumable item or minor piece of equipment from an enemy. Does not break stealth.

trap_sense.name: Trap Sense
trap_sense.description: Passively detect traps within 3 tiles. Can attempt to disarm them (Finesse + Thievery vs trap difficulty).

turn_the_tables.name: Turn the Tables
turn_the_tables.description: Disarmed traps can be re-armed facing the enemy. Enemies trigger your repositioned traps as if you placed them.

quick_escape.name: Quick Escape
quick_escape.description: Active (free action, 3-turn cooldown). Move up to 3 tiles immediately, ignoring reaction attacks and terrain penalties.

vanishing_act.name: Vanishing Act
vanishing_act.description: Quick Escape also grants stealth and removes all enemy targeting on you.

appraisers_eye.name: Appraiser's Eye
appraisers_eye.description: Identify the value of items at a glance. Detect hidden compartments in containers (20% chance to find bonus loot).

black_market_contacts.name: Black Market Contacts
black_market_contacts.description: Access a special merchant with rare and restricted items. Buying and selling prices are 15% better than normal merchants.

fence.name: Fence
fence.description: Sell stolen goods at full price instead of the usual penalty. Black market merchant restocks more frequently.

opportunistic_grab.name: Opportunistic Grab
opportunistic_grab.description: When an enemy dies, 20% chance to find an additional item beyond normal loot.

fortune_favors.name: Fortune Favors
fortune_favors.description: Once per encounter, guarantee a rare drop from a defeated enemy.

concussive_force.name: Concussive Force
concussive_force.description: Mace hits have a 20% chance to apply Dazed (-10% accuracy, -10% Dodge) for 1 turn.

bone_breaker.name: Bone Breaker
bone_breaker.description: Enemies who fail a stun save from your mace attacks also suffer -1 Movement for 3 turns.

thunderous_impact.name: Thunderous Impact
thunderous_impact.description: Critical hits with maces knock the target prone (no save) and apply Dazed for 2 turns.

skull_crack.name: Skull Crack
skull_crack.description: Stunned or Dazed enemies take +20% damage from all sources.

shieldbreaker.name: Shieldbreaker
shieldbreaker.description: Mace attacks reduce target's Armor by 10% per hit (stacks, lasts 3 turns).

overwhelming_blow.name: Overwhelming Blow
overwhelming_blow.description: Active (3 Stamina). Make an attack that pushes the enemy 1 tile. If they can't be pushed (wall, another unit), they take +25% damage instead.

follow_through.name: Follow Through
follow_through.description: If a mace attack reduces an enemy below 50% HP, immediately make a free attack against the same or an adjacent enemy at -25% damage.

ground_slam.name: Ground Slam
ground_slam.description: Active (5 Stamina). Strike the ground, dealing 60% damage to all enemies within 1 tile. Enemies must pass a Finesse save or be knocked prone.

earthquake.name: Earthquake
earthquake.description: Ground Slam affects a 2-tile radius and creates difficult terrain for 2 turns.

mountain_falls.name: Mountain Falls
mountain_falls.description: Active (10 Stamina, once per combat). Devastating overhead strike dealing 200% damage. Target must pass a Constitution save at -20% or be Stunned for 2 turns. All enemies within 1 tile take 50% damage.

relentless_advance.name: Relentless Advance
relentless_advance.description: After hitting an enemy, gain +1 Movement for 1 turn. Taking damage does not reduce your Movement.

juggernaut.name: Juggernaut
juggernaut.description: While at or above 50% HP, immune to slow, knockback, and forced movement from enemies.

unyielding.name: Unyielding
unyielding.description: Once per combat, when reduced below 25% HP, gain +30% Armor, +30% Damage, and immunity to stun for 3 turns.

heavy_armor_training.name: Heavy Armor Training
heavy_armor_training.description: Reduce movement and dodge penalties from heavy armor by 50%.

armored_skin.name: Armored Skin
armored_skin.description: When wearing heavy armor, gain +10% resistance to all elemental damage.

fortified.name: Fortified
fortified.description: +15% Armor when wearing a complete set (head, chest, and legs all equipped).

living_fortress.name: Living Fortress
living_fortress.description: While in heavy armor, immune to critical hits. All hits against you are treated as normal hits.

shield_mastery.name: Shield Mastery
shield_mastery.description: Shields grant +10% more Armor than their base value.

shield_bash.name: Shield Bash
shield_bash.description: Active (3 Stamina). Requires shield. Push an enemy 1 tile and apply -10% accuracy for 1 turn.

deflection.name: Deflection
deflection.description: 15% chance to completely block an incoming attack (reduce damage to 0). Requires a shield.

tower_shield.name: Tower Shield
tower_shield.description: Block chance increases to 25%. Blocked ranged attacks are reflected back at the attacker for 30% damage.

shield_wall.name: Shield Wall
shield_wall.description: Active. End your turn. Until next turn, gain +25% Armor and adjacent allies gain +10% Armor.

stalwart_guardian.name: Stalwart Guardian
stalwart_guardian.description: Active (1 action). Choose an adjacent ally. Until your next turn, attacks targeting that ally have a 50% chance of targeting you instead. You gain +15% Armor while guarding.

brace_for_impact.name: Brace for Impact
brace_for_impact.description: Active (free action, 3-turn cooldown). Until your next turn, reduce the next incoming hit by 30%.

damage_control.name: Damage Control
damage_control.description: When you take damage, reduce it by an additional flat amount equal to 10% of your max HP.

stone_body.name: Stone Body
stone_body.description: +25% resistance to bleed, poison, and other effects that bypass armor.

last_man_standing.name: Last Man Standing
last_man_standing.description: While at or below 25% HP, gain +50% Armor and +25% to all saves. Cannot be killed by damage-over-time effects.

wear_it_well.name: Wear It Well
wear_it_well.description: +5% Stamina recovery rate per piece of armor worn (up to +20% with 4 pieces).

armor_of_faith.name: Armor of Faith
armor_of_faith.description: Gain bonus Armor equal to 10% of your highest elemental affinity total.

stone_skin_mastery.name: Stone Skin Mastery
stone_skin_mastery.description: Earth defensive spells (Stone Skin, Iron Will, etc.) gain +15% effectiveness.

crystalline_edge.name: Crystalline Edge
crystalline_edge.description: Earth damage spells have a 20% chance to apply Brittle (-15% Armor) for 2 turns.

tremor.name: Tremor
tremor.description: Earth AoE spells have a 25% chance to knock enemies prone (Finesse save negates).

weight_of_the_mountain.name: Weight of the Mountain
weight_of_the_mountain.description: Enemies damaged by Earth spells suffer -1 Movement for 2 turns (stacks up to -3).

petrify.name: Petrify
petrify.description: Active (once per combat, 12 Mana). Target enemy must pass a Constitution save at -20% or be turned to stone for 3 turns (incapacitated, immune to damage, +50% Armor). On save, Slowed for 2 turns instead.

raise_wall.name: Raise Wall
raise_wall.description: Active (6 Mana). Create a stone wall (3 tiles long, blocks movement and line of sight). Destructible (moderate HP). Lasts 4 turns.

fortify_position.name: Fortify Position
fortify_position.description: Allies adjacent to your stone walls gain +10% Armor and +10% resistance to ranged attacks.

crumbling_avalanche.name: Crumbling Avalanche
crumbling_avalanche.description: Active. Destroy one of your stone walls. All enemies within 2 tiles take Earth damage (50% Spellpower) and are knocked prone (Constitution save negates knockdown).

gravity_well.name: Gravity Well
gravity_well.description: Active (8 Mana). Create a 2-tile radius zone for 3 turns. Enemies inside suffer -2 Movement and -15% Dodge.

crushing_gravity.name: Crushing Gravity
crushing_gravity.description: Enemies in a Gravity Well also take 10% Spellpower as Earth damage per turn.

shared_strength.name: Shared Strength
shared_strength.description: Earth buff spells that target a single ally also grant +5% of the buff's value to adjacent allies.

bedrock.name: Bedrock
bedrock.description: Passive. You and allies standing on earth or stone terrain gain +5% Armor and +5% resistance to forced movement.

roots_of_the_world.name: Roots of the World
roots_of_the_world.description: Active (once per combat, 15 Mana). All allies gain +25% Armor, +25% to all saves, and immunity to knockdown and knockback for 3 turns.

mantra_of_the_earth_store_bodhisattva.name: Mantra of the Earth Store Bodhisattva
mantra_of_the_earth_store_bodhisattva.description: Ongoing effect (3-tile radius): Each turn, allies gain stacking +3% Armor and +3% physical damage resistance (stacks up to 5 times). The ground beneath allies becomes blessed, granting 2% max HP regeneration per turn. Deity Yoga — He Who Bears the Weight of All Worlds: All allies gain +40% Armor and immunity to all forced movement and knockdown. Enemies in contact with the ground take Earth damage (20% Spellpower) per turn. Allies cannot be reduced below 1 HP for the duration.

mantra_of_the_jeweled_mountain.name: Mantra of the Jeweled Mountain
mantra_of_the_jeweled_mountain.description: Ongoing effect: Each turn, crystal formations grow on 1 random tile within 3 tiles of the caster (blocks movement, has moderate HP). Allies adjacent to crystals gain +5% to all stats per adjacent crystal. Deity Yoga — The Mountain That Does Not Bend: Create a crystalline barrier encompassing all allies within 4 tiles. The barrier absorbs all incoming damage from outside (total HP = 200% of caster's Spellpower). While the barrier holds, allies inside gain +20% to all stats.

lasting_bond.name: Lasting Bond
lasting_bond.description: Summons last 2 additional turns before expiring.

apex_predator.name: Apex Predator
apex_predator.description: Your strongest active summon (highest base stats) gains +30% to all stats.

strength_in_numbers.name: Strength in Numbers
strength_in_numbers.description: You may maintain 1 additional summon active simultaneously.

horde_master.name: Horde Master
horde_master.description: You may maintain 2 additional summons. Summoning spells cost 15% less mana.

alpha_and_omega.name: Alpha and Omega
alpha_and_omega.description: When you have 3+ summons active, all summons gain +10% to all stats per summon beyond the second.

pack_tactics.name: Pack Tactics
pack_tactics.description: Summons gain +10% Attack when adjacent to another summon or to you.

coordinated_assault.name: Coordinated Assault
coordinated_assault.description: When you attack an enemy, all your summons gain +15% damage against that enemy until your next turn.

summoners_command.name: Summoner's Command
summoners_command.description: Active (free action). Direct one summon to immediately move up to its full Movement and make one attack.

guardian_instinct.name: Guardian Instinct
guardian_instinct.description: Summons within 2 tiles of you have a 25% chance to intercept attacks targeting you (redirecting the attack to themselves).

shared_vitality.name: Shared Vitality
shared_vitality.description: When a summon dies, 20% of its max HP is distributed as healing to you and allies within 2 tiles.

elemental_infusion.name: Elemental Infusion
elemental_infusion.description: When casting a summoning spell, choose an element. The summon gains +20% damage of that element and +15% resistance to that element.

summoners_bond.name: Summoner's Bond
summoners_bond.description: Gain +5% to all saves while you have at least one summon active.

mantra_of_the_four_guardian_kings.name: Mantra of the Four Guardian Kings
mantra_of_the_four_guardian_kings.description: Ongoing effect (3-tile radius): Each turn, summon a minor spirit guardian (1 HP, high Dodge, non-attacking). Each guardian provides +3% Armor to the nearest ally. Up to 4 spirit guardians can exist simultaneously. Deity Yoga — The Four Walls of Heaven: Summon 4 powerful Guardian Kings at the cardinal points around the caster. Each has high HP, high Armor, moderate damage, and provides +10% Armor and +10% resistance to one element (one per King) for all allies within 3 tiles. They last until destroyed.

mantra_of_the_jeweled_pagoda.name: Mantra of the Jeweled Pagoda
mantra_of_the_jeweled_pagoda.description: Ongoing effect: Each turn, the caster's Spellpower for summoning increases by +5% (stacks up to 5 times). All active summons gain +3% to all stats per stack. Deity Yoga — The Tower That Contains All Realms: Your next summoning spell calls the most powerful version of that creature. The summon has triple HP, double damage, and radiates an aura (2-tile radius) that grants allies +10% to all stats and inflicts enemies with -10% to all stats.

forage.name: Forage
forage.description: Active (overworld). Search the current area for supplies. Yield depends on terrain: food in forests, herbs in meadows, minerals in mountains.

extended_march.name: Extended March
extended_march.description: Party can take one additional overworld action per day before fatigue penalties apply.

safe_campsite.name: Safe Campsite
safe_campsite.description: Ambush chance during rest reduced by 30%. Party heals +15% more HP during rest.

supply_cache.name: Supply Cache
supply_cache.description: Once per area, stash supplies that can be retrieved later. Stashed items don't count toward weight limit.

scout_ahead.name: Scout Ahead
scout_ahead.description: Active (overworld). Reveal nearby points of interest and dangers within a moderate radius.

lay_of_the_land.name: Lay of the Land
lay_of_the_land.description: Scouting also reveals terrain types, enemy compositions, and optimal routes. Entering a scouted encounter grants +3 Initiative to the party for the first round.

tactical_assessment.name: Tactical Assessment
tactical_assessment.description: Before combat, see a summary of enemy types and approximate threat level. Choose your starting formation from 3 preset options.

prepared_ground.name: Prepared Ground
prepared_ground.description: Active (once per combat, before first turn). Place 3 tiles of terrain: barricade (half cover), caltrops (movement damage), or blessed ground (minor healing).

field_kitchen.name: Field Kitchen
field_kitchen.description: Food items provide +10% bonus to their effects (healing, stat buffs, morale).

quartermaster.name: Quartermaster
quartermaster.description: Equipment degradation reduced by 30%. Consumables with limited uses gain +1 use.

master_of_the_supply_line.name: Master of the Supply Line
master_of_the_supply_line.description: All party consumables are 25% more effective. Once per day, refill one depleted basic supply (bandage, ration, torch).

welloiled_machine.name: Well-Oiled Machine
welloiled_machine.description: At the start of combat, all allies begin with +5% Stamina and +5% Mana (from proper pre-battle preparation).

strategic_withdrawal.name: Strategic Withdrawal
strategic_withdrawal.description: Active. Once per encounter, the party may retreat from combat without penalty (no lost items, no reputation loss). Must be used before any ally begins bleeding out.

know_the_market.name: Know the Market
know_the_market.description: See the true value of all items. Overpriced items are highlighted in shops.

bulk_discount.name: Bulk Discount
bulk_discount.description: When buying 3+ items from a merchant, gain an additional 10% discount.

preferred_customer.name: Preferred Customer
preferred_customer.description: Merchants restock faster and occasionally offer exclusive items to you.

luxury_goods.name: Luxury Goods
luxury_goods.description: Access to a special tier of high-quality equipment at each merchant not normally available.

trade_empire.name: Trade Empire
