trade_empire.description: Passive income: gain gold at the end of each in-game day equal to 3% of your current gold (minimum 50).

appraiser.name: Appraiser
appraiser.description: Identify magical properties of items without using scrolls or spells. Reveal hidden enchantments on equipment.

investment.name: Investment
investment.description: Active (overworld). Invest gold in a settlement. Returns 150% of the invested amount after several in-game days.

diversified_portfolio.name: Diversified Portfolio
diversified_portfolio.description: Maintain up to 3 investments simultaneously. Returns increased to 200%.

hired_help.name: Hired Help
hired_help.description: Mercenary companions cost 15% less to recruit.

headhunter.name: Headhunter
headhunter.description: Access to higher-quality mercenaries. Recruited companions start with 10% more XP.

golden_tongue.name: Golden Tongue
golden_tongue.description: Once per settlement, recruit one mercenary for free.

supply_and_demand.name: Supply and Demand
supply_and_demand.description: Active (overworld). Check available trade goods between known settlements. Buying low and selling high grants triple the normal gold difference.

merchant_prince.name: Merchant Prince
merchant_prince.description: All party members benefit from 10% better prices when trading, even when the Trade specialist isn't doing the talking.

patron_of_the_arts.name: Patron of the Arts
patron_of_the_arts.description: Donate gold to gain reputation. Higher reputation unlocks exclusive dialogue options, quests, and shop tiers.

apprentice_smith.name: Apprentice Smith
apprentice_smith.description: Can craft basic weapons and armor from common materials.

journeymans_touch.name: Journeyman's Touch
journeymans_touch.description: Crafted items gain a random minor bonus (+5% to one stat).

master_craftsman.name: Master Craftsman
master_craftsman.description: Choose the bonus on crafted items instead of random. Crafted items have +15% better stats overall.

legendary_artisan.name: Legendary Artisan
legendary_artisan.description: Once per rest, craft an item of rare quality with a unique name and enhanced bonuses.

reinforce.name: Reinforce
reinforce.description: Active (out of combat). Upgrade an existing piece of equipment, granting +10% to its primary stat permanently.

socket.name: Socket
socket.description: Add a gem socket to a piece of equipment. Sockets hold gems, charms, or essences for additional bonuses.

masterwork_enhancement.name: Masterwork Enhancement
masterwork_enhancement.description: Socketed items gain double the benefit from their gems and essences. Can add a second socket to one item.

field_repair.name: Field Repair
field_repair.description: Active (1 action in combat, 3-turn cooldown). Restore 25% of an ally's Armor value, countering sunder effects.

improvised_barricade.name: Improvised Barricade
improvised_barricade.description: Active (1 action). Create a 1-tile barricade at an adjacent position. Provides half cover (+15% Armor) for anyone behind it. Lasts 3 turns.

trap_maker.name: Trap Maker
trap_maker.description: Active (1 action). Place a trap on an adjacent tile. The first enemy to enter takes damage equal to 30% of your Focus and is immobilized for 1 turn.

salvage.name: Salvage
salvage.description: Break down unwanted items for materials, recovering 50% of the item's material value.

efficient_salvage.name: Efficient Salvage
efficient_salvage.description: Recover 75% of material value and gain a 20% chance to extract a rare component.

armor_specialist.name: Armor Specialist
armor_specialist.description: Crafted armor gains +10% Armor and -10% Movement penalty.

weapon_specialist.name: Weapon Specialist
weapon_specialist.description: Crafted weapons gain +10% Damage and +5% accuracy.

dual_discipline.name: Dual Discipline
dual_discipline.description: Can dual-wield a sword and dagger. Off-hand dagger attacks deal 50% damage. Switching between any weapons is a free action.

phalanx_fighter.name: Phalanx Fighter
phalanx_fighter.description: While wielding a spear and shield, allies adjacent to you gain +15% Armor. Your spear reaction attacks also trigger when adjacent allies are targeted by melee attacks.

weapon_master.name: Weapon Master
weapon_master.description: +10% damage with all weapons. Switching weapons is a free action. +1 action on the first turn of combat.

brawlers_grapple.name: Brawler's Grapple
brawlers_grapple.description: Active (5 Stamina). Grab an adjacent enemy. They cannot move or attack until they pass a Strength check (your Strength + Unarmed vs their Strength + 10). Your unarmed attacks against a grappled target have +30% accuracy and cannot be Dodged.

skirmisher.name: Skirmisher
skirmisher.description: Ranged attacks suffer no accuracy penalty when made after moving. You can disengage as a free action once per turn.

axe_and_board.name: Axe and Board
axe_and_board.description: While wielding an axe and shield, your shield bash stuns for 1 extra turn and your axe attacks deal +10% damage against stunned targets. Shield is not required for axe damage bonus if target is already stunned.

spellblade.name: Spellblade
spellblade.description: When you cast a self-targeting enchantment, your sword gains bonus elemental damage equal to 20% of your Spellpower for the buff's duration. Element matches the enchantment's school.
spellblade.flavor: The blade remembers what the hand commands.

arcane_archer.name: Arcane Archer
arcane_archer.description: Active (4 Stamina + spell mana cost). Imbue your next ranged attack with a known single-target spell. The arrow delivers the spell on hit, using your ranged accuracy instead of spell accuracy.

curseblade.name: Curseblade
curseblade.description: Dagger attacks from stealth apply a random minor curse (Weakness, Blind, or Slow) for 2 turns. Dagger crits have a 30% chance to apply the same effect outside stealth.

thunder_breaker.name: Thunder Breaker
thunder_breaker.description: Stun effects you inflict also Silence the target for 1 turn. Mace attacks against Silenced enemies deal +15% damage.

flame_fist.name: Flame Fist
flame_fist.description: Unarmed attacks deal bonus fire damage equal to 15% of your Spellpower. On crit, the target burns for 3 turns.

frost_warden.name: Frost Warden
frost_warden.description: Your zone-of-control reaction attacks Slow enemies for 1 turn. While you did not move this turn, your spear's reach extends by 1 tile.

holy_smite.name: Holy Smite
holy_smite.description: Active (4 Stamina + 8 Mana). Channel divine energy into a weapon strike: +30% damage as Holy. Heals you for 25% of damage dealt. Double damage vs undead and demons.

elementalist.name: Elementalist
elementalist.description: Spells that target an enemy's elemental weakness deal +25% damage. You can identify elemental weaknesses without spending an action to scan.
elementalist.flavor: The universe speaks in five voices.

necromancer.name: Necromancer
necromancer.description: When an enemy dies, you may spend 10 Mana to raise it as an undead minion at 50% of its original stats. Maximum 2 undead active at once. Undead last until destroyed but cannot be healed.

mystic_healer.name: Mystic Healer
mystic_healer.description: Your single-target healing spells also apply a minor buff (Regen, +10% Armor, or +10% Dodge — chosen randomly) for 2 turns.

metamagic.name: Metamagic
metamagic.description: Once per combat, modify a spell as you cast it. Choose one: double range, split between 2 targets (75% damage each), or convert its element to another you have at 3+.

storm_summoner.name: Storm Summoner
storm_summoner.description: Your summons gain a lightning aura: enemies ending their turn adjacent to a summon take air damage equal to 10% of your Spellpower.

living_fortress.name: Living Fortress
living_fortress.description: Defensive enchantments (Stone Skin, etc.) gain +2 turns duration and provide knockback immunity. You may maintain one additional concentration enchantment beyond the normal limit.

prepared_caster.name: Prepared Caster
prepared_caster.description: You can prepare 2 additional spells per rest. Mandala creation time reduced by 1 action.

void_necromancy.name: Void Necromancy
void_necromancy.description: Your curses cannot be dispelled by normal means (requires a dispel of equal or higher level). Debuffs you inflict last 1 extra turn.

diamond_body.name: Diamond Body
diamond_body.description: While unarmored, +25% resistance to all status effects. Immune to poison and disease. If you also have Iron Shirt Technique, its Armor bonus increases by 10%.
diamond_body.flavor: The body is the first temple.

one_mind_one_fist.name: One Mind, One Fist
one_mind_one_fist.description: You can make unarmed attacks while chanting a mantra without breaking the chant. Landing an unarmed hit during a mantra accelerates progress by 1 turn.

walking_meditation.name: Walking Meditation
walking_meditation.description: Movement does not break concentration or mantra chanting. +2 Movement while chanting a mantra.

dharma_warrior.name: Dharma Warrior
dharma_warrior.description: Defeating an enemy during mantra chanting grants +1 bonus mantra turn of progress. Non-lethal victories (enemies surrender at 1 HP instead of dying) grant +2 karma and +10% XP from the encounter.
dharma_warrior.flavor: The sword that spares cuts deeper.

karmic_insight.name: Karmic Insight
karmic_insight.description: You can sense the karma alignment of NPCs and enemies (hostile, neutral, virtuous). Dialogue options with karmic weight are highlighted. +15% XP from events resolved peacefully.

shadow_strike.name: Shadow Strike
shadow_strike.description: Attacks from stealth deal +50% damage and Silence the target for 1 turn. After attacking from stealth, 30% chance to immediately re-enter stealth if no enemies are adjacent.

poisoner.name: Poisoner
poisoner.description: Weapon coatings last twice as long (double applications per dose). During events, you can poison food, drink, or supplies — targets are Weakened for their next encounter.

cat_burglar.name: Cat Burglar
cat_burglar.description: Lockpicking and trap disarming are completely silent. Can pickpocket enemies in combat (steal one consumable). +25% chance to evade traps that trigger.

saboteur.name: Saboteur
saboteur.description: Can create trapped objects that deal damage and apply a status effect when enemies interact with them. During events, can sabotage enemy equipment — reducing their Attack or Armor by 15% for the next encounter.

gentleman_thief.name: Gentleman Thief
gentleman_thief.description: Shops never report theft. Can "case" shops through conversation to reveal hidden inventory. Persuasion checks involving deception gain +20%.
gentleman_thief.flavor: It's only stealing if they notice.

ambush_predator.name: Ambush Predator
ambush_predator.description: If you attack from stealth with a ranged weapon, the target cannot take reactions until their next turn. Allies attacking a target you revealed from stealth gain +10% accuracy for 1 turn.

war_chant.name: War Chant
war_chant.description: Bardic performances affect all allies regardless of range (normally area-limited). Performance buffs last 1 extra turn.

field_commander.name: Field Commander
field_commander.description: At the start of combat, all companions may reposition up to 2 tiles before the first turn. All companions gain +1 Movement for the first round.

comic_relief.name: Comic Relief
comic_relief.description: Active (1 action). Tell a joke that restores 15% Stamina to all allies within earshot. Outside of combat, removes Fear and restores low morale.
comic_relief.flavor: "We're not going to die here. I haven't finished my bit."

healer_general.name: Healer General
healer_general.description: Companions can use healing items on each other as a free action once per round (normally costs an action). Your Medicine bonuses apply to companion-administered healing at 50% effectiveness.

sacred_authority.name: Sacred Authority
sacred_authority.description: Area-of-effect healing spells gain +25% effectiveness. When you heal an ally, they gain +10% damage on their next attack.

inspiring_sermon.name: Inspiring Sermon
inspiring_sermon.description: Active (1 action, non-combat). Give a speech that grants all party members +10% to their next skill check and +5% damage for the next encounter. Stacks up to 2 times between rests.

know_your_enemy.name: Know Your Enemy
know_your_enemy.description: Scanning an enemy costs 0 actions (normally 1). Scanned enemies take +10% damage from all party members. Enemy information persists between encounters.

theoretical_breakthrough.name: Theoretical Breakthrough
theoretical_breakthrough.description: Once per rest, cast a spell one level above your current ability from a school you have at 4+. The spell costs double mana.

battle_analyst.name: Battle Analyst
battle_analyst.description: +10% accuracy and +10% damage against enemy types you've previously defeated. After defeating 3+ of the same type, bonuses increase to +15%.

living_library.name: Living Library
living_library.description: Knowledge-based dialogue options are always available regardless of party composition. Events that reward knowledge grant +20% XP.

tactical_adaptation.name: Tactical Adaptation
tactical_adaptation.description: After the first round of combat, you identify the enemy composition. All companions gain +5% accuracy and +5% Dodge for the remainder of the battle.

supply_chain.name: Supply Chain
supply_chain.description: Shops restock 50% faster. Bulk purchases (3+ of the same item) receive a 15% discount.

field_workshop.name: Field Workshop
field_workshop.description: Can craft and repair during travel without stopping. Repair costs reduced by 50%.

witch_doctor.name: Witch Doctor
witch_doctor.description: Potions you brew or administer heal 50% more. After combat, you can brew one basic medicine from enemy loot at no material cost.
witch_doctor.flavor: Nothing is wasted when you know what to look for.

master_enchanter.name: Master Enchanter
master_enchanter.description: Can permanently enchant one piece of equipment per rest. Adds a minor elemental bonus (+5% damage or +5% resistance of a chosen element). One enchantment per item.

merchant_prince.name: Merchant Prince
merchant_prince.description: Unlock exclusive shop tiers with rare items. Can hire elite mercenaries unavailable to others. +10% to both buy and sell prices on top of Trade bonuses.

void_adept.name: Void Adept
void_adept.description: Space magic mana costs reduced by 15% (multiplicative). +10% to all Space-element skill checks. Once per rest, cast your next Space spell as a free action (no action cost).
void_adept.flavor: You have touched the emptiness between things.

wind_adept.name: Wind Adept
wind_adept.description: +1 permanent Movement Speed. Air damage +15%. Immune to Slow effects.
wind_adept.flavor: The wind does not ask permission.

flame_adept.name: Flame Adept
flame_adept.description: Fire damage +15%. Immune to fear and morale penalties. Leadership and Performance effect durations +1 turn.
flame_adept.flavor: Passion is not consumed — it is shared.

tide_adept.name: Tide Adept
tide_adept.description: All healing effects +15% (given and received). +20% resistance to water and ice damage. Can breathe underwater (event use).

stone_adept.name: Stone Adept
stone_adept.description: +10% max HP. +10% Armor. Crafted items are one quality tier higher. Immune to knockback and forced movement.
